decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. All 10 checked sessions followed it consistently.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 69/2598 lines reworked (2.7%, 23/50). 0/29 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 5.7% (4/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 63. Session 11: 49 (process:30 efficiency:13 ttfw:6). Session 12: 56 (process:30 efficiency:14 ttfw:12).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 211/211 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
